## Maintenance Task Description
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task.

## Task Type
- [ ] Code cleanup
- [ ] Dependency updates
- [ ] Documentation updates
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Performance optimization
- [ ] Security updates
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Priority Level
- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High
- [ ] Critical

## Expected Impact
Describe the expected impact of completing this maintenance task.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, references, or information about the maintenance task here.

## Checklist
- [ ] Task has been reviewed
- [ ] Impact has been assessed
- [ ] Resources have been allocated
